**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Kewei Auto Parts Co., Ltd. provides an extremely classic demotion specimen of a 'street-side auto parts shop mistakenly labeled as an automobile manufacturing plant.' The official commercial registration system was clearly triggered by a mechanical classification logic surrounding the term 'auto parts,' directly assigning it to the very pinnacle of the heavy industry pyramid: 'Automobile Manufacturing - Complete Auto Manufacturing.' However, the forensic probe pierced this absurd hallucination in a single second: this is a micro-enterprise with a paid-in capital of only 300,000 RMB and a 2024 insured headcount of merely '2' people. The most lethal factor is its geographical coordinates: located at 'No. 184-1 Daming Road, Qinhuai District, Nanjing City.' Daming Road is an extremely famous 'street of auto 4S dealerships and auto parts markets' in Nanjing. Inside such a street-facing shop, two employees with 300,000 RMB are 'manufacturing complete automobiles' in the store? This not only defies industrial common sense but also lacks the space to park even a single semi-finished vehicle. Examining its extremely brief and honest business license, it is entirely filled with 'wholesale' and 'sales,' completely devoid of the word 'manufacturing.' Diagnostic conclusion: this is absolutely not an auto manufacturing plant; this is an extremely typical 'two-person micro auto parts and lubricating oil wholesale/retail storefront' located within the Daming Road Auto Parts Market.
